name: TeslaMate
description: A powerful, self-hosted data logger for your Tesla vehicle with Grafana dashboards and real-time MQTT support.

notes.text: Grafana is accessible on port 3000 with default credentials admin/admin
Change the Grafana admin password after first login!
To enable MQTT, edit /opt/teslamate/.env: set DISABLE_MQTT=false and add MQTT_HOST, MQTT_USERNAME, MQTT_PASSWORD
